name: codex-action-board
description: Local Action Board for reviewing Codex suggestions with optional Arabic RTL support.

scripts.check: node --check desktop/inject-action-board.mjs && node --check desktop/verify-action-board.mjs && node --check src/codex-rtl-engine.js && node --check src/action-board-core.js && node --check src/action-board.js && node --check src/action-board-background.js && node --check scripts/sync-extension.mjs && node --check scripts/check-extension-sync.mjs && node --check extension/codex-rtl-engine.js && node --check extension/action-board-core.js && node --check extension/action-board.js && node --check extension/action-board-background.js && node scripts/check-extension-sync.mjs && node --test tests/*.test.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/check-powershell.ps1
